summary: Tested new features: Delivery options at checkout, NGN currency support, and seller review system. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Delivery options and checkout modal working correctly. Found 1 bug: NGN currency symbol (₦) not displaying on auction detail page.

ui_bugs.issue: NGN currency symbol (₦) not displaying - shows $ instead of ₦ for NGN auctions
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Add currency symbol logic: const currencySymbol = auction?.currency === 'NGN' ? '₦' : '$'; and use {currencySymbol} instead of hardcoded $

passed_tests: Backend: Create auction with delivery options (local_pickup, city_to_city)
Backend: Auction detail returns delivery_options array
Backend: Buy Now endpoint accepts delivery_option and delivery_address
Backend: Buy Now with local_pickup (no address required)
Backend: Create auction with NGN currency
Backend: Auction detail returns correct NGN currency
Backend: Search auctions by currency filter
Backend: GET /api/users/{user_id}/reviews endpoint works
Backend: GET /api/reviews/seller/{seller_id} endpoint works
Backend: GET /api/users/{user_id}/rating endpoint works
Backend: Confirm delivery model accepts rating and review_comment
Backend: Auction includes seller_rating field
Backend: Buy Now stores order_details with delivery info
Backend: Featured auctions include delivery options
Backend: Auctions list includes currency field
Frontend: Login page loads without errors
Frontend: Auctions list shows NGN currency symbol (₦) correctly
Frontend: Auction detail shows Delivery Options section
Frontend: Delivery options show Local Pickup, City-to-City, International
Frontend: Checkout modal opens on Buy Now click
Frontend: Checkout modal shows Delivery Method selection
Frontend: Checkout modal shows Payment Method (Stripe/PayPal)
Frontend: Checkout modal shows Order Summary with total
action_items: Fix NGN currency symbol display in AuctionDetail.jsx - replace hardcoded $ with dynamic currency symbol based on auction.currency
critical_code_review_comments: AuctionDetail.jsx lines 579, 595, 619, 700-704, 830-834: Hardcoded $ symbol should be replaced with dynamic currency symbol. Add: const currencySymbol = auction?.currency === 'NGN' ? '₦' : '$';
seed_data_creation: Created test auctions with delivery options and NGN currency during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Delivery options (local_pickup, city_to_city, international) display on auction detail and checkout modal - WORKING. 2) NGN currency support - Backend WORKING, Frontend has bug (shows $ instead of ₦). 3) Seller review system - Backend endpoints WORKING, integrated with delivery confirmation. CheckoutModal.jsx correctly handles currency symbol. AuctionDetail.jsx needs fix for currency symbol.

delivery_options_at_checkout.details: Checkout modal shows delivery options with correct pricing, auto-selects first option

ngn_currency_support.details: Backend fully supports NGN. Frontend auctions list shows ₦ correctly. Auction detail page shows $ instead of ₦ (BUG)

seller_review_system.details: GET /api/users/{user_id}/reviews works. DeliveryConfirmation accepts rating and review_comment. Seller rating updated after review.
